items.desc: Today, I’m talking with Jennifer Scanlon, who is the CEO of UL Solutions. That’s Underwriters Laboratories – you know, the UL logo listed on all your electronics? items.title: Amazon snaps up Oprah Winfrey’s podcast
items.desc: Oprah Winfrey's video podcast, Book Club, and Favorite Things are headed to Amazon, according to reports from The New York Times and Variety. items.title: Govee’s multicolor ceiling light doubles as a low-res screen
items.desc: The smart lighting company is having a busy month. items.title: Spotify is partnering with Peloton for guided workouts
items.desc: Spotify has dabbled in customized running playlists, but now it's diving more firmly into the fitness space with curated playlists and content from creators like Yoga with Kassandra, Sweaty Studio, Chloe Ting, and Pilates Body by Raven. items.title: The AI-designed car is taking shape
items.desc: The auto design world is full of advanced 3D visualization tools and VR sculpting platforms, but your average new car still enters the world as a sketch. items.title: This touchscreen mouse is my over-engineering nightmare

items.title: Google’s new gradient icon design is coming to more apps
items.desc: In late 2025, Google started rolling out new icons with a gradient design.
